dashboard.title: Jadawalin Manomi
dashboard.vaults_desc: Bincika dama, saka kadarori, kuma kalli yadda amfanin ku ke karuwa.
dashboard.assistant_subtitle: Shawarwari kan amfanin gona da dabarun taska
dashboard.welcome_title: Barka da zuwa Mataimakin AI na Gona
dashboard.welcome_desc: Sami keɓaɓɓen shawara kan sarrafa amfanin gona, shawarwarin yanayi, dabarun taska, da bin diddigin nasarori.
dashboard.seasonal_tips_subtitle: Jagora mai amfani ga gonar ku
dashboard.no_tips_desc: Gwada zabar wani amfanin gona ko yanayi daban don ganin basirar noma mai dacewa.

landing.header_subtitle: Tsarin aikin tallafin noma tare da tsari mai kyau da bayyanannun bayanai.
landing.hero_title: Salo kore-da-fari mai daidaituwa ga kowane tsarin aiki na tsakiya.
landing.hero_subtitle: Yanzu mahada tana amfani da rarrabuwar sarari daya, rubutu mai karfi, da launukan noma daya a fadin kewayawa, katuna, fom, da wuraren bincike.
landing.analytics_subtitle: Daidaitaccen padding, ginshikai masu amsawa, da bayyananniyar matsayi na rubutu suna sa bayanan sauƙin dubawa.

workflow.title: Karfafa Noma
workflow.step1_desc: Maɓallan kore masu haske da aka keɓe don mataki na gaba mai mahimmanci.
workflow.step2_desc: Sassa masu tsaka-tsaki suna rage surutu yayin da suke sa hanyoyin haɗin gwiwa da ayyuka cikin sauƙin gani.
workflow.step3_desc: Abubuwan shigarwa suna raba tsayi, radius, yanayin mayar da hankali, da dokokin sarari iri ɗaya.

landing.features_subtitle: Tarin manoma masu amfani da kayan aiki masu kyau da dabarun dorewa don haɓaka amfanin gona da inganci.

features.feat1_desc: Sa ido kan kayan aiki mai amfani da AI da kiyayewa kafin lalacewa don ayyukan gonar ku.
features.feat2_desc: Analitiks na ainihi akan lafiyar ƙasa, yanayin yanayi, da hasashen amfanin gona.
features.feat3_desc: Hanyar samar da kayayyaki da aka haɗa tare da farashi mai gaskiya da ingantattun hanyoyin isarwa.
features.feat4_desc: Amintaccen ajiyar hatsi tare da sa ido na IoT da fasahar kiyaye inganci.

footer.tagline: Karfafa manoma masu zuwa tare da amfanin DeFi mai dorewa, bayyane, kuma amintacce.

vaults.title: Taskoki na Gona Masu Kyau
vaults.subtitle: Sanya kadarorin ku cikin dabarun samar da amfani ta atomatik. Bi diddigin ci gaban ku na yanayi da kuma cimma nasarori.

auth.login_subtitle: Shiga don duba ayyukan tallafi, bi diddigin ci gaban sasantawa, da sarrafa oda a duk fadin dandalin.
auth.signup_subtitle: Bude asusu don fara sarrafa tsarin aikin tallafin ku na noma.
auth.panel_title: Tsarin aiki mafi kyau ga ƙungiyoyin tallafin noma.
auth.panel_subtitle: Hadin gwiwa ga manoma, masu saye, da masu dubawa don sarrafa oda, tallafi, da tabbatarwa a wuri guda.
auth.badge1: Tallafin da za a iya bi diddigi

portfolio.title: Fasahar Gudanarwa Na
portfolio.overview_desc: Bi diddigin kadarorinku, abubuwan da kuka samu, da ayyukanku a duk taskokin Harvest.
portfolio.transaction_desc: Cikakken tarihin ajiyar ku, cire kudi, da ladubban da kuka nema.

modals.offline_note: Ayyukan da aka yi ba tare da intanet ba za a sanya su a layi ta atomatik kuma za a daidaita su lokacin da intanet ya dawo.
modals.select_vault_error: Da fatan za a zaɓi taska
modals.valid_amount_error: Da fatan za a shigar da adadi mai kyau
modals.insufficient_balance: Ma'auna bai isa ba a taska
modals.early_withdrawal_warning: Hattara: Lokacin amfanin gonar ku bai riga ya cika ba. Cire kudi da wuri na iya haifar da rage ribar yanayi.
